name: Gepard Landau
description:
~flowers in bloom~

~~~~~

Gepard stares up at the shop sign above his head, dread pooling in his stomach. Eversummer Florist. He's just here to get some flowers, he tells himself. No particular other reason than that, why else would he be in a florist shop, right?

But that feeling of excitement, hopefullness and panic in his gut is not so easily shaken. He swallows, once, twice, thrice, feels his throat constrict and his mouth dry despite everything. Then, he takes a deep breath and steps into the shop.

Gepard has a crush on the cute florist. Does she feel the same about him?

~~~~~

Geppy is just too cute not to do this trope with, sue me. If you look in the dictionary for the definition of golden retriever puppy, you'll only find Gepards face and you cannot convince me otherwise ^.^
